name: Roasted Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 1/2 ounces) Garbanzo beans, drained and rinsed
1 can (15 1/2 ounces) Red Kidney beans, drained and rinsed
or 1 1/2 cups cooked Red Kidney beans
1 can (15 ounces) Blackeye beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a large jelly roll pan with aluminum foil and spray with cooking spray.
2. Cut eggplant, zucchini, sweet and white potatoes, peppers, and leek into 3/4 to 1-inch pieces.
3. Arrange the vegetables on the pan and spray generously with cooking spray. Sprinkle with the combined herbs.
4. Bake in a preheated 425°F oven until the vegetables are browned and tender, about 30 minutes.
5. Spray a large saucepan with cooking spray and heat over medium heat until hot.
6. Sauté garlic until tender for 2 to 3 minutes.
7. Add the roasted vegetables, beans, vegetable broth, wine, and vinegar; bring to boiling.
8. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 5 to 10 minutes. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Nutritional Information Per Serving: Calories 278, Carbohydrate 53 g, Protein 13 g, Fat 4 g, % of Calories from Fat 13, Sodium 562 mg, and Cholesterol 0 mg.
